text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Happy holidays to you, Trainer. The Mejiro family
does host the most wonderful parties...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But this year, I'd rather celebrate in different
company, at a cozier gathering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In line with Mejiro Bright's wishes, I arrange for
her to celebrate with some of her peers.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Bright! Trainer! Hello! Thank you for inviting me
along to this fated and festive shindig!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Bright... We're going to exchange gifts today,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes! There'll be heartfelt gifts for each of us.
I expect it'll be wonderful fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the gift-giving begins. First, Silence
Suzuka readies her gift for Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru... This is for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oooh? What could this be? How curious. It
appears to be wrapped... inside a plastic
shopping bag from a convenience store?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's where I bought them. It's some gum, a
charger... Oh, and some salt and pepper.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Salt and pepper?! Whatever for?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm sure I can use it to exorcise something
or other! Appreciated!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I think it might be my turn next. This is from me to
you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten you a hair clip. It's just perfect for
your beautiful hair.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you, really. But, um, Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like all I do is take. You've given me so
many invaluable gifts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Suzuka... Teehee. But that's just how I feel
too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Right, so that just leaves my present for Bright. Okay, my present for you is a big, total...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Mystery!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wowww... A secret present? Whatever could it
be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's just say that's under wraps for now. It's not
ready to be revealed yet, so I'll not be divulging
any details...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I guarantee all will come to light within the
year! Wait with bated breath!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It sounds like she has something big in the
works. Let's wait and see what it is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... It was so much fun spending this special
day as a quartet. ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, our bonds as contemporaries felt stronger
than ever!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's different when we're together. We share
so many memories...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Before parting ways for the night, why don't we
all go stargazing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I hope that we can continue walking beside one
another forevermore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka closes her eyes, Mejiro Bright
brings her hands together, and
Matikanefukukitaru claps twice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their three wishes join snugly together before
fading away into the starry night sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once the other two leave...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I think I'd like something from you, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I could trouble you for a present
perhaps?
choice_data_list: Sorry, I didn't bring you anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's quite all right. What you have with you
will more than suffice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I don't have anything nice that would make a
decent present. I wonder what she's talking
about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee! What I'd like from you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Is your future, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'd like for you to share your future with the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright says this with a big grin on her face,
but the look in her eyes tells me she's not entirely
joking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I'm being self-indulgent... And I've made
what sounds like an unreasonable request... But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's not quite right. You see, it's... the will of
the Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family needs you. We need you if
we're to go on shining into the future forever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My older sisters say that no house can
flourish on its own strength alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's vital that we meet new people—people who
can introduce us to new ideas and ways of
thinking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I'm not the one... who's been waiting for
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family itself has been. And it has been
for a very long time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's voice seems to carry a will greater
than hers alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look up, and there it is—a river of starlight
flowing through the generations.
